source: CT6-6 requirements §7 (CMD-1 … CMD-4): when MemPalace is installed, CLAUDE.md becomes a thin pointer (load on demand) not a container — component 3 of the in-repo tier

scenarios: a container is flagged and a generated pointer passes
acceptance_criteria: generate_pointer_claude_md: wake-up first step (CMD-2) + under budget (CMD-3) + standards + customizations (CMD-4)

scenarios: the contract states the precondition + reuse
acceptance_criteria: CMD-1 precondition: only when MemPalace installed, stop if absent
MemPalace detection delegated to mempalace-integration (not reinvented)
signals disclaimed as heuristics with human-judgment backstop
forbids deleting context not first stored in MemPalace
engine is the single home for budget + markers (skill calls it)
44 skills with claude-md-efficiency entry across README/CLAUDE/CODEBASE_MAP
full suite green cp1252 AND PYTHONUTF8=1

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A — no UI/frontend surface (a stdlib-only engine + a skill contract + tests + docs).
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A — no service API; the engine + CLI are exercised by the pytest suite (incl. real subprocess + generate→assess round-trip).
testing_authorizations.both_layer_front_to_back: N/A — single-layer (Python engine + skill doctrine) change.
